c.d: Total number of monthly active users across all platforms, indicating collaboration reach and network effect potential
c.s: Company reports, market research firms, app analytics platforms

c.d: Number and quality of simultaneous collaboration capabilities like live editing, screen sharing, instant messaging, and co-creation tools
c.s: App feature documentation, user reviews, feature comparison sites

c.d: Number of supported platforms and devices including mobile, desktop, web, and integration capabilities with other tools
c.s: Official app stores, developer documentation, compatibility matrices

c.d: Percentage of Fortune 500 companies and large organizations using the platform, indicating reliability and scalability for team collaboration
c.s: Enterprise software reports, case studies, business intelligence platforms

c.d: Average rating across major app stores and review platforms, reflecting overall user experience and collaboration effectiveness
c.s: App Store ratings, Google Play ratings, enterprise software review sites
